ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "area_sq_km" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" TEXT /* Population density of the region per square kilometer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the census data is collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the census */,
  "census_count" INTEGER /* Total census count for the year */,
  "change_from_previous" INTEGER /* Change in census count from the previous census */,
  "percent_change" TEXT /* Percentage change in census count compared to the previous census */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating data quality issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the census */,
  "census_type" TEXT /* Type of census (e.g., national, regional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census data record */,
  "previous_count" INTEGER /* Census count from the previous year */,
  "current_count" INTEGER /* Current census count */,
  "change_value" INTEGER /* Absolute change in value */,
  "percent_change" TEXT /* Percentage change from the previous year */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (e.g., boundary changes, data corrections) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_changes_census_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percent_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage change record */,
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census data record */,
  "percent_change" TEXT /* Percentage change in population count */,
  "change_category" TEXT /* Category of change (e.g., growth, decline, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percent_changes_census_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count for the age group and gender */,
  "population_proportion" TEXT /* Proportion of the population for the age group and gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, planner, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether data was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_census_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "(report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the request */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report type requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the report was requested */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report requested */,
  "report_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the report (e.g., region, year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integration */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data integrated (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the data was integrated */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path of the integrated data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integration_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
